title: Skills Bridge Project
shortDescription: A Hybrid RAG and knowledge graph system for occupation-skills mapping.
longDescription: This project explores multi-source data ingestion, dense vector retrieval, graph-based reasoning, and API-based access for labor-market intelligence.
impact: Supports structured analysis of occupation-skill relationships for workforce intelligence.

title: Digital Government AI Readiness
shortDescription: A framework for assessing and improving AI readiness in public-sector institutions.
longDescription: Developing a comprehensive set of indicators and policy recommendations to guide digital transformation and AI adoption in government agencies.
impact: Provides a roadmap for public-sector leaders to navigate the complexities of AI integration.

title: Event Tabulation Systems
shortDescription: Real-time tabulation systems for major international and local pageants and festivals.
longDescription: Developed a series of high-reliability, real-time tabulation systems for events like Miss Asia Pacific International and various local festivals in the Philippines.
impact: Ensured accurate, transparent, and instant results for high-stakes competitions.
